pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-019 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.453 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Synthetic Data Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. In-scope domain, score 0.453. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-T-019 as a discrete competency for Synthetic Data Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI and Machine Learning is primary for Synthetic Data Engineer. Score 0.453. Market evidence strongly supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld. AI and Machine Learning is core for Synthetic Data Engineer. Market evidence supports inclusion.

decision_rationale: AI and Machine Learning (primary) for Synthetic Data Engineer. Score 0.453. Market evidence supports inclusion as a discrete competency.
